description:
A domain for interacting with Cast, Presentation API, and Remote Playback API
functionalities.

properties.name: session
properties.description:
Text describing the current session. Present only if there is an active
session on the sink.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Starts observing for sinks that can be used for tab mirroring, and if set,
sinks compatible with |presentationUrl| as well. When sinks are found, a
|sinksUpdated| event is fired.
Also starts observing for issue messages. When an issue is added or removed,
an |issueUpdated| event is fired.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Stops observing for sinks and issues.

commands.name: setSinkToUse
commands.description:
Sets a sink to be used when the web page requests the browser to choose a
sink via Presentation API, Remote Playback API, or Cast SDK.

commands.name: startDesktopMirroring
commands.description: Starts mirroring the desktop to the sink.

commands.name: startTabMirroring
commands.description: Starts mirroring the tab to the sink.

commands.name: stopCasting
commands.description: Stops the active Cast session on the sink.

events.name: sinksUpdated
events.description:
This is fired whenever the list of available sinks changes. A sink is a
device or a software surface that you can cast to.

events.name: issueUpdated
events.description:
This is fired whenever the outstanding issue/error message changes.
|issueMessage| is empty if there is no issue.
